name: io.github.relatasql/relatasql-mcp
description: Official MCP server for RelataSQL — list connections, inspect schemas, run read-only SQL, sandbox statements, and govern writes through your RelataSQL API key.

environmentVariables.name: RELATASQL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your RelataSQL API key (Settings -> API Keys, starts with relata_live_).

environmentVariables.name: RELATASQL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your RelataSQL backend, e.g. https://api.your-domain.com.
